textByHash.22e5cb249bdc6043d7e93327fe71db4de267b281: Well met, fellow adventurer! How can I help you?
textByHash.c35124e693414380ba1908bfc410dc3c129e10b8: How frightfully rude of me, my dear chap. My name is Odovacar and I work for that excellent enterprise, the Bank of Gielinor.
textByHash.484cd95b1d04ddfd27c6fda716459aca9d156404: How frightfully rude of me, my dear girl. My name is Odovacar and I work for that excellent enterprise, the Bank of Gielinor.
textByHash.866a8bd7691943eea27fa55754b6b2661804c398: As part of our ongoing service to provide you, the customer, with an absolutely world-class banking experience, we are investigating the option of opening a chain of travelling banks. These will provide you, our
textByHash.81a5dad69d8531936e53716efae053fd86eb31e0: esteemed customer, with the convenience of having banking facilities where they will be of optimum use to you. Such as here!
textByHash.f00a6e42cb1fa5210b87b51d38b188a68eb7cf98: I am the first of a new generation of travelling bankers that will wander the perilous areas of the world to provide you, the valued customer, with a bank when you need it most!
textByHash.e602fe095060e14bbb38b6a5b19ad3fc8116a6f1: Absolutely correct, dear sir. I must warn you, however, that due to the significantly increased overheads of an enterprise such as this, there is a small bank charge of 100gp every time you want to access your account.
textByHash.c808d6238b271cf93b3496a8c096033e3bcbd0c9: Absolutely correct, dear lady. I must warn you, however, that due to the significantly increased overheads of an enterprise such as this, there is a small bank charge of 100gp every time you want to access your account.
textByHash.bc4d444f6c04924bbe362ae94420e072332ce8e6: It's not that I don't trust you to pay afterwards, old chap, but as the old adage goes, 'money comes before friends'.
textByHash.48fd3daecc684bf5ee80c7ce120ec57a3761d690: It's not that I don't trust you to pay afterwards, old girl, but as the old adage goes, 'money comes before friends'.
textByHash.31237678fac57d5b58a4a9769f1e4bbdd32d150d: I'm sorry to hear that, sir. If you should reconsider, because I believe this service offers excellent value for money, do not hesitate to contact me.
textByHash.87f8d3e9bcff83ba29d375c2cbea9dffd41ade4f: I'm sorry to hear that, madam. If you should reconsider, because I believe this service offers excellent value for money, do not hesitate to contact me.
textByHash.df7f0efb91d4bcd6f4a8c7c869a3ae17e5a6458f: I'm afraid you don't have the necessary funds with you at this time so I can't allow you to access your account. Please come again, when you have 100 gold to cover the fee.
textByHash.56d59bb05aa1037e15dc6fdef56e874e2c25a744: I'm afraid you don't have the necessary funds with you at this time so I can't allow you to collect your items. Please come again, when you have 100 gold to cover the fee.
textByHash.ccf35ec3c5de915631086d1d5e0d88e6325c9186: How frightfully rude of me, my dear lady. My name is Odovacar and I work for that excellent enterprise, the Bank of Gielinor.
textByHash.1a934ebdfbd980214715094f65a3ee4712cfc14f: My services will cost you 100 coins.
textByHash.6b1be591a42c6706d2718bee037397c63d4a0b47: Sorry, I don't perform that service.
